'''Freda''' were a species from [[Freda]]. They were locked in an arms race against the nearby [[Jante]] until the Freda attacked Jante industrial plants on [[Rett II]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], led by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Haveland/Legends|Haveland]] ordered a ceasefire, which the Freda eventually withdrew from.
